protocol.cost_default: 6bp/side for current scans; older alt_oi_taker artifact used 5bp/side
protocol.strict_mdd: includes in-position adverse excursion and period-contained exits
protocol.promotion_rule: Do not promote because leverage can lift CAGR/MDD; alpha itself must survive test and eval.
protocol.trading_target_asset: BTC. External/cross-asset features may be used as inputs, but alpha entries here trade BTC unless explicitly stated otherwise.
protocol.alpha_pool_threshold: A strategy may stay as alpha_pool candidate only if it exceeds CAGR/strict_MDD >= 2.5 on test2024 after being combined with other features/gates; otherwise record as weak/rejected feature/selector evidence.
protocol.live_grade_threshold: Live-grade single strategy must exceed CAGR/strict_MDD >= 3.0 as a standalone strategy, with strict MDD and period-end forced close.
protocol.below_threshold_policy: Rows below alpha_pool_threshold should not be treated as alpha candidates; keep them as feature/selector candidates unless portfolio marginal contribution later proves value.

entries.name: Long union range/momentum/funding/compression breakout
entries.description: Long-regime BTCUSDT union strategy that fires when any of four interpretable setup components are active: upper range breakout, HTF momentum with acceptable 30d position, low-funding trend squeeze, or compression breakout.
entries.entry_logic: OR union of range_bb90, mom85_pos50, funding10_trend70, compress05_trend80. range_bb90=(rex_576_range_width_pct>=0.1295981611 and bb_z>=1.6850824974); mom85_pos50=(htf_1d_return_4>=0.0691416467 and rex_8640_range_pos>=0.1127012517); funding10_trend70=(funding_rate<=-0.0000167 and trend_96>=0.0074852182); compress05_trend80=(rex_2016_range_width_pct<=0.0507431447 and trend_24>=0.0047972289).
entries.exit_logic: fixed hold 576 5m bars (48h), stride 12 bars, next-open entry, 0.5x leverage in validation; split/window-end forced close via strict simulator.
entries.evidence: First long-regime candidate in this branch to clear CAGR/strict_MDD >=3 on 2024 test, 2025 eval, 2026H1, and combined 2024~2026H1 while keeping nontrivial trade count. Discovered after moving away from pullback-only gates to explicit alpha-family union.
entries.leakage_notes: Thresholds are train<2024 quantiles, but union composition was selected after inspecting discovery/validation tables through 2026H1. This is candidate-grade, not final clean unseen proof. Do not live-size without predeclared rolling validation or fresh out-of-sample data.
entries.next_action: Run rolling/month-block validation, ablation/marginal contribution checks, and live-sim conversion under long regime only. If stable, create configs/live candidate with the same fixed thresholds and hold semantics.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: OR union of range_bb90, mom85_pos50, funding10_trend70, compress05_trend80 using fixed thresholds listed in this entry.
usage_recipe.exit_logic: fixed hold 576 bars; stride 12; next-open entry; long only; 0.5x validation leverage.

evaluation_protocol.cost: fee_rate=0.0004 and slippage_rate=0.0001 per entry/exit side as implemented by strict simulator
evaluation_protocol.mdd: strict OHLC MDD includes in-position adverse excursion and full calendar idle time in CAGR denominator

promotion_guardrails: No reselecting components on eval/2026 before rolling validation
Require ablation to show each component adds or diversifies
Use only when operator declares long/bullish regime
usage_recipe.live_use_notes: Candidate only. Promising enough to implement live-sim next, but not yet final production sizing.

entries.name: Bear-regime REX short reclaim/failure sleeve
entries.description: Short-only REX/LLM sleeve for persistent bearish regimes. Executes exported prediction.gate=TRADE and prediction.side=SHORT from the rex_htf_pullback_reclaim family.
entries.entry_logic: Manual/higher-level bear regime must be active. Then execute prediction rows where gate=TRADE and side=SHORT from results/rex_dual_regime_eval_2025_2026h1_predictions_2026-07-03.jsonl.
entries.exit_logic: Fixed hold 144 5m bars, next-open entry, 0.5x validation leverage; live pilot config currently uses max_holding_bars=144 and allowed_signals=[SHORT].
entries.evidence: Hand-built short rule families failed as universal short alphas, but the REX short prediction sleeve clears CAGR/strict_MDD >=3 in the intended bear-regime window 2025~2026H1 with 49 trades and low strict MDD.
entries.leakage_notes: Candidate is regime-conditional and based on prior exported predictions. It should not be judged as all-market universal short; conversely, it must not be traded unless bearish regime is declared without looking ahead.
entries.next_action: Implement/verify live dry-run bridge for this sleeve under require_bear_regime=true, and regenerate train-only predictions for future rolling validation.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: bear regime gate + REX prediction gate=TRADE side=SHORT
usage_recipe.exit_logic: fixed hold 144 bars; next-open entry; strict short MDD uses intrabar highs

evaluation_protocol.split: bear eval=2025, bear ytd=2026-01-01..2026-06-02; all-market 2024~2026H1 reported separately
evaluation_protocol.cost: fee_rate=0.0004 and slippage_rate=0.0001 per side as strict simulator params
evaluation_protocol.mdd: strict short MDD includes intrabar high adverse excursion and full calendar idle time in CAGR denominator

promotion_guardrails: Require explicit non-lookahead bearish regime gate
Do not combine with long-regime sleeve unless portfolio allocator enforces regime separation
Regenerate prediction file from documented train-only process before production sizing
usage_recipe.live_use_notes: Candidate for bear-regime paper/live dry-run, not universal short.

entries.name: Non-REX FX-stress BTC short
entries.description: Short-only BTCUSDT sleeve for persistent bearish regimes using BTC 3-day weakness plus USD/KRW stress. This is deliberately independent from REX state and is intended as a separate short alpha family.
entries.entry_logic: Manual/higher-level bear regime must be active. Enter short when htf_3d_return_1 <= -0.0325294973 (train q0.20) and usdkrw_zscore >= 1.3870063775 (train q0.90).
entries.exit_logic: Short TP 4%, SL 2.5%, maximum hold 288 5m bars (24h), next-open entry. Conservative same-bar assumption: SL before TP.
entries.evidence: Found after excluding REX: event/blowoff/liquidation shorts were weak, but FX-stress + BTC HTF weakness with short-specific TP/SL produced a bear-regime candidate with ratio >3 and nontrivial trades. Conservative q0.20 variant is preferred because 2024 remains positive and lower MDD than q0.30.
entries.leakage_notes: This is not an unseen-proof final strategy: TP/SL and q variant were chosen after inspecting bear windows. Must be revalidated via rolling/fresh data before live sizing.
entries.next_action: Run predeclared rolling validation and then test portfolio marginal contribution against bear_rex_short_reclaim_20260710.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: bear regime gate + htf_3d_return_1 <= -0.0325294973 + usdkrw_zscore >= 1.3870063775
usage_recipe.exit_logic: TP=4%, SL=2.5%, max_hold=288 5m bars, next-open entry

evaluation_protocol.mdd: strict short MDD includes intrabar high adverse excursion; CAGR denominator includes idle time

promotion_guardrails: Keep separate from REX state to measure true diversification
usage_recipe.live_use_notes: Candidate only; good next target for paper/live-sim after rolling validation.

entries.name: Non-REX premium-discount panic BTC short
entries.description: Short-only BTCUSDT sleeve for persistent bearish regimes using low HTF range position plus deeply negative premium_index_zscore. This is independent of REX and distinct from FX-stress short.
entries.entry_logic: Manual/higher-level bear regime must be active. Enter short when htf_3d_range_pos <= -0.5114186851 (train q0.20) and premium_index_zscore <= -1.4720931200 (train q0.10).
entries.exit_logic: Short TP 2.5%, SL 1.5%, maximum hold 288 5m bars (24h), next-open entry. Conservative same-bar assumption: SL before TP.
entries.evidence: Found after filtering non-REX candidates. Conservative TP2.5/SL1.5 version has better 2024 stability; TP4/SL2.5 version has stronger bear_combined but weaker 2024. Both indicate premium-discount panic continuation is a real short-feature family.
entries.leakage_notes: Exit choice inspected OOS windows. Candidate only until rolling/fresh validation confirms.
entries.next_action: Run rolling validation and portfolio marginal contribution against nonrex_fx_stress_short_20260710 and bear_rex_short_reclaim_20260710.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: bear regime gate + htf_3d_range_pos <= -0.5114186851 + premium_index_zscore <= -1.47209312
usage_recipe.exit_logic: TP=2.5%, SL=1.5%, max_hold=288 5m bars, next-open entry

evaluation_protocol.mdd: strict short MDD includes intrabar high adverse excursion; CAGR denominator includes idle time

promotion_guardrails: Do not merge with REX until marginal contribution is measured
usage_recipe.live_use_notes: Candidate only; likely useful as separate derivatives-panic sleeve.

entries.name: Non-REX premium-discount + kimchi-unwind BTC short
entries.description: Bear-regime short union combining premium-discount panic and kimchi-unwind weakness. This uses two independent non-REX short contexts: derivatives discount/panic plus Korea premium unwind.
entries.entry_logic: Manual/higher-level bear regime must be active. Enter short when either premium_panic=(htf_3d_range_pos <= -0.5114186851 and premium_index_zscore <= -1.47209312) OR kimchi_unwind=(htf_3d_return_1 <= -0.0303196833 and kimchi_premium_change <= -0.0046123752).
entries.exit_logic: Short TP 4%, SL 2.5%, max hold 288 5m bars (24h), next-open entry. Conservative same-bar assumption: SL before TP.
entries.evidence: Selector overlay scan shows premium_panic + kimchi_unwind union improves bear combined return and trade count versus premium-only while keeping 2024 positive. It is weaker than premium+sellflow in bear ratio but far more robust in 2024. Strategy review accepted this as alpha-grade for bearish regimes because shorts should not be penalized as universal all-market strategies when the declared use case is major downtrends.
entries.leakage_notes: Union composition was selected after inspecting 2024/2025/2026H1 overlay results; candidate-grade until predeclared rolling or fresh validation.
entries.next_action: Treat as promoted bear-regime alpha; run rolling/marginal-contribution validation versus premium-only, FX-stress, and REX before live sizing.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: bear regime gate + (premium_panic OR kimchi_unwind)
usage_recipe.exit_logic: TP=4%, SL=2.5%, max_hold=288 5m bars

evaluation_protocol.mdd: strict short MDD includes intrabar high adverse excursion; CAGR denominator includes idle time

promotion_guardrails: Compare against premium-only to avoid double-counting same edge
2024 under-threshold ratio is acceptable only when classified as non-bear/regime mismatch, not as live failure.
Must be disabled outside operator/declarative bear regime.

entries.promotion_basis: Promoted by user/strategy review as a bear-regime alpha: short sleeves are expected to be difficult in bullish regimes, so 2024 under-threshold behavior is treated as regime mismatch rather than disqualification. Still requires non-lookahead bear-regime gate for use.

entries.name: Long range/funding/premium squeeze breakout
entries.description: Long-regime BTCUSDT OR-union alpha combining derivatives under-positioning/discount with positive price-action continuation. It was found after expanding beyond the first long union into fixed component/TP/SL sweeps.
entries.entry_logic: OR union of range_bb90, funding10_trend70, premium20_mom90. range_bb90=(rex_576_range_width_pct>=0.1295981611 and bb_z>=1.6850824974); funding10_trend70=(funding_rate<=-0.0000167 and trend_96>=0.0074852182); premium20_mom90=(premium_index_change<=-0.00023471 and htf_1d_return_4>=0.0940403009).
entries.exit_logic: fixed hold 576 5m bars (48h), no TP/SL overlay, stride 12 bars, next-open entry, 0.5x validation leverage; split/window-end forced close via strict simulator.
entries.evidence: Reusable scan rerun found this fixed component union clears CAGR/strict_MDD >= 3 on 2024 test, 2025 eval, 2026 YTD, and combined 2024~2026H1 while reporting absolute return and full-window CAGR. This adds a derivatives premium/funding squeeze family distinct from the earlier momentum-heavy long union.
entries.leakage_notes: Component thresholds are fixed from prior train-window quantile discovery, but component union selection inspected 2024/2025/2026 tables. Treat as candidate-grade until predeclared rolling/fresh OOS validation. Market rows after 2026-06-02 are excluded before feature build.
entries.next_action: Run predeclared rolling/month-block validation and live-sim conversion under operator-declared long regime; do not reselect components on eval/2026 before the next validation pass.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: OR union of range_bb90, funding10_trend70, premium20_mom90 using fixed thresholds listed in this entry.
usage_recipe.exit_logic: fixed hold 576 bars; stride 12; next-open entry; long only; no TP/SL; 0.5x validation leverage.
